transactions.desc: The Nationals optioned Schultz to Triple-A Rochester following Tuesday's game against Philadelphia.
Hunt was optioned to Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
Fermin (concussion) was reinstated from the 7-day injured list Tuesday.
The Padres recalled Sears from Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The St. Louis Cardinals traded RHP Chris Roycroft to the Tampa Bay Rays. The Rays then optioned him to the minors.
The Mets claimed Oliva off waivers from the Giants on Tuesday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Cubs recalled Murray from Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday.
The Cubs optioned Hollowell to Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday.
The Mariners optioned Joe to Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday.
The Mariners reinstated Arozarena (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Royals recalled Rojas from Triple-A Omaha on Tuesday.
The Tigers optioned Cruz to Triple-A Toledo on Tuesday.
The Twins selected Voth's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday.
The Tigers selected Malgeri's contract from Triple-A Toledo on Tuesday.
The Twins optioned Laweryson to Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday.
The Brewers released Rengifo on Tuesday, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Blue Jays designated Juenger for assignment Tuesday.
The Blue Jays optioned Estrada to Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
The Blue Jays activated Bieber (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Tuesday.
Triple-A St. Paul reinstated Jenkins (shoulder) from its 7-day injured list Monday.
The Twins promoted Houston from High-A Cedar Rapids to Double-A Wichita on Monday.
The Yankees recalled Escarra from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Tuesday.
The Reds optioned Benson to Triple-A Louisville on Tuesday, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.
The Reds activated De La Cruz (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.
The Orioles designated Siani for assignment on Monday.
The Orioles selected Tromp's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
Atlanta signed Leon to a minor-league deal on Monday, Lindsay Crosby of BravesToday.com reports.
Mancini elected free agency Monday.
The Angels designated Madrigal for assignment Monday.
The Angels reinstated Soler (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Monday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat cleanup in the Angels' series opener versus the Orioles.
